description_long: This bed features a rustic wooden frame constructed from thick, roughly hewn logs, giving it a sturdy and natural appearance. The sleeping surface is a taut, brown fabric or leather stretched between the frame, with visible sagging and texture. A single, round, gray cushion or pillow is placed at one end, providing minimal head support. The bed lacks a traditional headboard or footboard, instead relying on the raised log frame at both ends for structure. The overall design is simple and utilitarian, reminiscent of a camp or outdoor setting. The materials and construction suggest durability and a handcrafted aesthetic suitable for parks or outdoor urban relaxation areas.
description: A rustic wooden bed with a stretched brown fabric surface and a single gray pillow, featuring a log frame and no headboard or footboard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the log frame, brown sleeping surface, and gray pillow on the right.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the thickness of the log frame and the round gray pillow at the near end.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the log frame and brown surface, with the pillow now on the left side.
description_view_3: Opposite end view with the gray pillow at the far end, emphasizing the length and narrowness of the bed.
